title: What to expect on the Claude Certified Architect — Foundations exam

format.delivery: Proctored (online via Pearson VUE OnVUE, or at a test center)

preparation: Anthropic Academy hosts free courses that map to the exam domains (Claude API, MCP, Claude Code). Work through them alongside this app.
The exam tests design judgment, not memorization: expect scenarios where you must choose the simplest architecture that meets the requirement.
Practice reasoning about trade-offs — cost vs. latency, workflow vs. agent, caching vs. compaction — rather than recalling exact parameter names.
proctoringNotes: Closed-book: no notes, no second screen, no AI assistants during the exam.
For online proctoring you need a webcam, a quiet private room, and a government ID.
Arrive/check in early; system checks (camera, microphone, network) can take several minutes.
disclaimer: Unofficial preparation material. Not affiliated with, authored by, or endorsed by Anthropic. Exam format, domain weights, question counts, and the passing score are set by Anthropic and may change — always confirm current details on Anthropic's official certification pages before your exam.
